🦇 Mysterious Elegance for the Fearless!
Drape your avatar in this long, flowing black coat with a sharp high collar and layered design. Its smooth leather-like texture and dramatic silhouette bring a gothic, detective, or anti-hero vibe to life—perfect for roleplay, fashion, or combat settings.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Sleek black leather-inspired finish ⚫
High collar and flowing design for a bold silhouette
Ideal for gothic, detective, or anti-hero characters
Works seamlessly in fantasy, modern, or futuristic worlds

Command the night and embody mystery with every step!
